pages.text: An $(item)Alchemist Storage Box$() is both an inventory item and a placeable block. Its twelve fixed slots hold one essence each, keeping a growing collection orderly.

pages.title: Four Matching States
pages.text: Each variant accepts only essences in its matching state. When you pick up an essence metal, a matching box in your offhand or inventory absorbs it automatically.

pages.title: Item and Block
pages.text: Right-click a held box to organize it. Place it to use it as a block; Shift-right-click the placed box to return it, contents intact, to your inventory.$(br2)When held beside a crucible, the box also becomes a rapid essence feeder. Its wheel controls are explained under $(l:transmutatoria:04_advanced_alchemy_1/scroll_alchemy)Scroll Alchemy$(/l).
